title.v: Đăng ký ca làm việc cho nhân viên

query.text:
declare @key nvarchar(4000), @join nvarchar(4000), @field nvarchar(4000), @day varchar(1024), @i int select @i = 1, @day = '' while @i < 32 select @day = @day + 'upper(n' + replace(str(@i, 2), ' ', '0') + '),', @i = @i + 1 select @day = substring(@day, 1, len(@day) - 1), @field = ' a.stt_rec_nv, rtrim(b.ma_nv) ma_nv, rtrim(b.ho_nv) + space(1) + rtrim(b.ten_nv) ho_ten, ' + case @@language when 'v' then 'c.ten_bp,' else 'c.ten_bp2,' end + @day select @key = 'b.bp_ref like ''' + @bp_ref + '%''', @join = 'left join hrnv b on a.stt_rec_nv = b.stt_rec left join hrbp c on b.bo_phan = c.ma_bp' if @ma_nv <> '' select @key = @key + ' and a.stt_rec_nv = ''' + (select rtrim(stt_rec) from hrnv where ma_nv = @ma_nv) + '''' if @ma_vtr <> '' select @key = @key + ' and b.vi_tri = ''' + replace(rtrim(@ma_vtr), '''', '''''') + '''' if @bac_ql <> '' select @key = @key + ' and b.bac_quan_ly = ''' + replace(rtrim(@bac_ql), '''', '''''') + ''''
declare @k1 varchar(1024), @k2 varchar(1024) select @k1 = stuff(@@firstItem, len(@@firstItem) - 12, 0, ' '), @k2 = stuff(@@lastItem, len(@@lastItem) - 12, 0, ' ') exec FastBusiness$HRM$ShiftSchedule$Finding @@prime, @@table, @@refresh, @@pageIndex, @@pageCount, @@lastPage, @@lastCount, @k1, @k2, @key, @join, 'rtrim(ma_nv) + '' '' + stt_rec_nv', @field, 'b.ma_nv', @bp_ref, @thang, @nam, '@@sysDatabaseName', @@admin, @@userID

title.v: Xóa đăng ký ca của nhân viên đã nghỉ$$90
title.e: Delete shift schedule of the leaved employees$Delete...$90
